recent.text: Morning. Brief's in your inbox — 92 active families, MRR $67.7K. Constraint at 62%. Five overdue W1s need Brodie.
My daily brief is basically empty — Meta Ads all dashes
Found the bug. Script was looking for cpbc_aud, data stored as cpbc. Also W1 starts was counting all-time pipeline — real number is 14, not 68. Rebuilding now.
Also add cost of acquisition. Ad spend divided by W1 starts
Done. CAC MTD: $127/W1 start ($4,201 spend ÷ 33 W1 starts). Added to brief hero metrics.
Lets build it all. Those 17 ideas. Why not?
Building. Wave 1 shipping now, Wave 2 this afternoon, Wave 3 tonight.
